summary: Guest Mode feature testing complete - All 10 features verified. Backend public endpoints work without auth. Frontend shows correct UI for guests including Dutch text, InlineLoginWall, and blocked actions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest Mode feature fully implemented and tested. Key verified features: 1) Onboarding has 'Browse without logging in' button 2) Find tab shows stations with pricing 3) Tap screen shows yellow guest banner 'Je browst als gast' with 'Inloggen' link 4) Tap button shows 'Bekijk Prijzen' for guests 5) Sessions/Profile tabs show InlineLoginWall with Dutch text 6) Pricing confirmation shows 'Inloggen om te Laden' button 7) LoginWall modal works from Inloggen link 8) Backend public endpoints (GET /api/stations, GET /api/stations/nearby) work without auth.

feature_1_onboarding_browse_button.description: Onboarding screen shows 'Browse without logging in' option at bottom

feature_2_find_tab_navigation.description: Clicking 'Browse without logging in' navigates to Find tab with 31 stations visible

feature_3_station_details_pricing.description: Guest can view station details and pricing (start fee €1.00, rate €0.45/kWh)

feature_4_sessions_login_wall.description: Sessions tab shows InlineLoginWall with Dutch text 'Inloggen voor sessiegeschiedenis'

feature_5_profile_login_wall.description: Profile tab shows InlineLoginWall with Dutch text 'Inloggen voor profiel'

feature_6_tap_guest_banner.description: Tap screen shows guest banner with 'Je browst als gast. Log in om te laden.' and 'Inloggen' link

feature_7_bekijk_prijzen_button.description: Tap button shows 'Bekijk Prijzen' for guests instead of 'Start Charging'

feature_8_pricing_confirmation_guest.description: Pricing confirmation shows 'Prijsinformatie' banner, full pricing details, 'Waarom inloggen?' section, and 'Inloggen om te Laden' button

feature_9_login_wall_modal.description: Clicking 'Inloggen' from guest banner opens LoginWall modal with 'Inloggen om te laden' title, benefits list, and action buttons

feature_10_backend_public_endpoints.description: GET /api/stations and GET /api/stations/nearby work without auth

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: MOCKED - Stripe payment intents are mocked in backend
